title: MCQ Maker question set
description: Canonical question set produced by the mcq-maker skill. Options are stored in any order with an explicit answer index; the build step / quiz JS performs the balanced position shuffle, so authored order does NOT need to be randomized here.

title.description: Quiz title (usually derived from the source document).

levelPoints.description: Points per conceptual level. Defaults to {"1":1,"2":2,"3":3}.

topics.description: Topics from the source. Questions are kept grouped by topic; topics are never interleaved.

id.description: Unique id across the whole set, e.g. t1-q3.

level.description: REQUIRED when category is conceptual (1=Understand/Apply, 2=Analyze, 3=Evaluate/Create). Must be null/absent otherwise.

question.description: The stem. Must not hint at the correct option.

options.description: Exactly four options. Similar in length/format; distractors plausible.

answer.description: Index (0-3) of the correct option within `options` as authored. Position is re-randomized at build/quiz time.

explanation.description: Why the answer is correct and the distractors are wrong. Recommended, especially for conceptual.
